# dspy.Signature

<!-- START_API_REF -->
::: dspy.Signature
    handler: python
    options:
        members:
            - append
            - delete
            - dump_state
            - equals
            - insert
            - load_state
            - prepend
            - with_instructions
            - with_updated_fields

        show_root_heading: true
